allow: PowerShell(Write-Output \("node: " + \(& node --version\)\); Write-Output \("npm: " + \(& npm --version\)\); Write-Output \("python: " + \(& python --version\)\); $ng = \(Get-Command ng -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($ng\) { Write-Output \("ng: found at " + $ng.Source\) } else { Write-Output "ng: NOT installed globally" })
